vocab.meaning: sự trung thành tuyệt đối với thương hiệu
vocab.example: I wouldn't say I have unwavering brand loyalty, but I do tend to stick with labels that have proven their worth.

vocab.meaning: mức giá đắt đỏ, cắt cổ
vocab.example: Many designer sneakers carry exorbitant prices that often reflect the logo more than the material.

vocab.meaning: độ bền bỉ theo thời gian
vocab.example: I opt for high-end hiking boots because their long-lasting durability is essential for rough terrains.

vocab.meaning: sự tay nghề/chế tác tỉ mỉ, tinh xảo
vocab.example: What draws me to famous Italian brands is the meticulous craftsmanship evident in every stitch.

vocab.meaning: có tính kinh tế, xứng đáng với số tiền bỏ ra
vocab.example: Buying one pair of quality shoes instead of five cheap ones is actually more cost-effective in the long run.

vocab.meaning: biểu tượng của địa vị xã hội
vocab.example: For some, wearing luxury brands is more about owning a status symbol than about actual comfort.

vocab.meaning: lớp đệm êm ái vượt trội (thường ở đế giày)
vocab.example: Professional running shoes from top brands provide superior cushioning that protects my joints during exercise.

vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: Beyond functionality, famous brands often collaborate with artists to enhance the aesthetic appeal of their collections.

vocab.meaning: nguồn gốc nguyên liệu có đạo đức (bảo vệ môi trường/lao động)
vocab.example: I am increasingly looking for famous brands that use ethically sourced leather and sustainable practices.
With the current market saturation of sports brands, consumers are truly spoilt for choice.
